hero.title: Opportunity for
hero.subtitle: Funding, Grants & Business Tools
hero.description: From funding and grants to software and market insights, we help entrepreneurs uncover strategic opportunities that fuel growth.

features.card1Desc: Our bots scan 1,000+ data sources daily to surface hidden funding opportunities, grants, and accelerator programs tailored to your industry and stage.
features.card2Desc: Navigate the modern age of AI with intelligence-driven business productivity tools, SaaS solutions, and digital resources curated for growth-stage ventures.
features.card3Desc: Stay ahead with cutting-edge fintech innovations, market analysis, and investment intelligence that helps you make smarter financial decisions.

subscription.heroDesc: Start for free and upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
subscription.freeDesc: Perfect for getting started with opportunities
subscription.whyGoProDesc: Powerful features designed to help you stay organized and never miss an opportunity.
subscription.ctaTitle: Ready to Never Miss an Opportunity?
subscription.ctaDesc: Join thousands of ambitious professionals who stay organized and ahead of deadlines.
subscription.proFeature_unlimitedDesc: Save as many opportunities and tools as you want. No limits, no restrictions.
subscription.proFeature_remindersDesc: Push notifications and email alerts for deadlines. Never miss an application window.
subscription.proFeature_calendarDesc: Automatically sync deadlines to your Google Calendar. All your dates in one place.
subscription.proFeature_aiDesc: AI-powered recommendations tailored to your profile, goals, and interests.
subscription.proFeature_adFreeDesc: Browse and research opportunities without any distractions whatsoever.
subscription.proFeature_exportDesc: Download your saved opportunities as PDF or CSV. Share with your team.
subscription.faq1A: When you save an opportunity with a deadline, you can set custom reminders. We'll send you push notifications and email alerts before the deadline so you never miss an application window.
subscription.faq2Q: How does Google Calendar sync work?
subscription.faq2A: Connect your Google Calendar once, and we'll automatically add opportunity deadlines as calendar events alongside your other commitments.
subscription.faq3Q: What can the AI Assistant do?
subscription.faq3A: Your personalized AI assistant learns your preferences and goals to recommend the most relevant opportunities. Ask it questions like "Find grants for tech startups in Africa" and get instant, tailored results.
subscription.faq4Q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
subscription.faq4A: Absolutely! Cancel anytime with no questions asked. You'll keep Pro access until the end of your billing period.

advertise.heroDesc: Put your brand in front of thousands of ambitious entrepreneurs, investors, and business leaders across 30+ countries.
advertise.statsDesc: Your brand deserves an audience that's actively seeking growth.
advertise.formatsDesc: Multiple ways to connect with our audience, tailored to your campaign goals.
advertise.format_sponsoredDesc: Feature your brand story, product, or service in a dedicated post seen by our engaged audience of entrepreneurs and business leaders.
advertise.format_displayDesc: Place banner and sidebar ads across our platform. Multiple formats available including horizontal, square, and responsive units.
advertise.format_newsletterDesc: Reach our subscriber base directly in their inbox. Our weekly newsletter has high open rates and a highly targeted audience.
advertise.step1Desc: Reach out to us via email or phone. Tell us about your brand, goals, and target audience.
advertise.step2Desc: Select the ad format that best fits your campaign — sponsored posts, display ads, or newsletter placement.
advertise.step3Desc: We handle the rest. Your campaign goes live and reaches thousands of ambitious entrepreneurs.
advertise.ctaDesc: Let's talk about how we can help you reach the right audience. Contact us today.

register.heroDesc: Join thousands of entrepreneurs discovering funding, grants, and tools to grow their business.
register.whyJoinTitle: Everything you need to find your next opportunity
register.whyJoinDesc: Edatsu brings together the resources entrepreneurs need — all in one place.
register.benefit1Desc: Access funding, grants, and accelerator programs from around the world.
register.benefit2Desc: Bookmark opportunities and tools to revisit anytime.
register.benefit3Desc: Get reminders for application deadlines that matter to you.
register.benefit4Desc: Find the right software and resources to grow your venture.

footer.brandDesc: Helping entrepreneurs discover funding opportunities, business tools, and resources to accelerate growth.

subFooter.title: Your next big
subFooter.desc: Join thousands of entrepreneurs who are already discovering and tracking opportunities that matter.
